text.message: that spot is a little too OP
can't let red beat orange to that spot - if he gets brick and wood port it's over
orange could have made our lives easier if he just moved over 1 spot
once he gets the wood port he needs nothing
it would have done us a huge favor if he went 8/10
guys - this is so terrible i can't play anymore
I don't understand why people think there is only one way to play... their way.
